narrative:
North Richland Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 494 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
